knowledge.html:
Reading Comprehension Strategies

Thường có 5 câu hỏi và được phân loại thành những dạng chính sau:

  • Main idea questions: What is the topic/subject/main idea of the passage?
  • Stated detail questions: According to the passage... / Which of the following is true?
  • Unstated detail questions: Which of the following is NOT true? / All of the following are true, EXCEPT...?
  • Pronoun reference questions: The word "..." in line ... refers to...?
  • Vocabulary questions: The word "..." is closest in meaning to...? / The word "..." is opposite in meaning to...?

Phương pháp làm bài:

  1. Đọc lướt bài đọc để nắm ý chính.
  2. Đọc câu hỏi và tìm từ khóa.
  3. Quay lại bài đọc tìm câu trả lời.
  4. Loại bỏ những phương án sai.

exercises.passage:
One of the most important discoveries of the nineteenth century was a method of using natural gas for cooking and heating. Large amounts of natural gas are found in the United States, usually several feet below the surface of the Earth. Natural gas is most often found in places where petroleum, the oil from which gasoline is made, is found. Often the natural gas must be removed before the oil itself can be reached.
For many years after natural gas was first discovered, it was thought to have no value. Finally, however, people began to understand its use and to find ways of storing it and moving it from place to place. Today natural gas is stored in large tanks and used for lighting, cooking and heating. It has also been used for electric generators and hybrid cars recently. In many ways natural gas is one of our finest fuels. It can be used for cooking without making the room hot. It is cheap and can be moved easily from one place to another through long pipelines, some of which are hundreds of miles in length.

questions.question: 1. This passage as a whole is about ________.
options: C. using natural gas and petroleum
D. natural gas and its use
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn thảo luận về khí tự nhiên là gì, cách phát hiện và các ứng dụng — đáp án D tóm tắt đúng nhất. Các đáp án khác chỉ nói một phần.

questions.question: 2. Which of the following is NOT true about natural gas?
options: A. It is not used for heating.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói khí tự nhiên dùng để 'cooking and heating' → đáp án A sai (không dùng để sưởi ấm là sai). Các đáp án B, C, D đều đúng theo văn bản.

questions.question: 3. How many uses of natural gas are mentioned?
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn liệt kê 5 công dụng: chiếu sáng (lighting), nấu ăn (cooking), sưởi ấm (heating), máy phát điện (electric generators), xe hybrid (hybrid cars). Đáp án D đúng.

questions.question: 4. What does the word "it" in the passage refer to?
questions.explanation: 'It' trong câu này chỉ khí tự nhiên (natural gas) — chủ ngữ chính của đoạn. Đáp án A đúng. 'electric generator'/'pipeline'/'tank' không phải chủ ngữ của đoạn.

questions.question: 5. Which of the following is closest meaning to "discovered"?
questions.explanation: 'Discovered' = discovered, phát hiện ra cái gì đó lần đầu tiên. Gần nghĩa nhất với 'found' (tìm thấy). 'invented' = phát minh, 'used' = dùng, 'stored' = lưu trữ — không đúng.

exercises.passage: Why should you learn a foreign language, such as English? First, learning a foreign language opens up job opportunities. Most companies look for people with foreign language skills. Second, learning a foreign language can offer a special experience to travellers. You can easily find the places, ask for directions, and even order food in the countries. Speaking a language also gives you a better understanding of the country's culture. Another reason why you should learn a foreign language is that it helps you to learn other subjects better. Learning a foreign language is hard and requires a lots of mental exercise. This, in turns, helps the brain to work better and strengthen the ability to memorize and analyze.

questions.question: 1. What is the topic of the passage?
options: A. The reasons for learning a foreign language
B. The benefits of learning English
C. The ways to learn a foreign language
D. The importance of communication with people
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn liệt kê nhiều lý do nên học ngoại ngữ → đáp án A đúng. B chỉ nói về lợi ích của tiếng Anh, C nói cách học, D nói tầm quan trọng của giao tiếp — đều không đầy đủ.

questions.question: 2. The word "it" refers to ________.
questions.explanation: 'It' ở đây chỉ 'learning a foreign language' — điều giúp em học các môn khác tốt hơn. Đáp án B đúng.

questions.question: 3. According to the text, which of the following statement is NOT true?
options: A. Most companies look for people with foreign language skills.
B. Learning a foreign language helps you to learn other subjects better.
C. Speaking a language gives you a better understanding of the country's culture.
D. It isn't necessary to know a foreign language
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nhấn mạnh nên học ngoại ngữ (không phủ định) → đáp án D sai. A, B, C đều đúng theo văn bản.

questions.question: 4. How many benefits of learning a foreign language are listed in the text?
questions.explanation: Có 3 lợi ích: cơ hội việc làm (job opportunities), du lịch (travel), và giúp học các môn khác tốt hơn. Đáp án C đúng.

questions.question: 5. The word "hard" is closest in meaning to ________.
questions.explanation: 'Hard' = khó, gần nghĩa nhất với 'difficult' (đáp án B). 'easy' = dễ, 'interesting' = thú vị, 'boring' = chán — nghĩa ngược.

exercises.passage:
Tropical cyclones are called typhoons in Asia and hurricanes in North and South America. These forms go around like a wheel turning to the left when they hit in the northern part of the world. They have wind speeds of 60 kph or more. In the United States, the Tropical Prediction Center in Miami, Florida keeps an eye out for hurricanes.
When meteorologists discover a hurricane, they give it a name. They can use either a male or female name. Why should tropical cyclones have names? The name makes it easy for people to keep up with information about a hurricane and its possible dangers.
The World Meteorological Organization (WMO), an international weather group decides what names will be used. The WMO makes lists of names using the English alphabet. Each name on the list starts with a different letter. The first hurricane of the year gets the first name on that year's list. The second hurricane gets the next name. For example, if the first hurricane is named Abel, the second might be named Betty. The name lists do not include names beginning with the letters Q, U, X, Y and Z. There aren't many names that begin with these letters.
Asian countries use a different list, which is made up by the WMO's Typhoon Committee. This list has a few personal names, but most of the names are of flowers, animals, trees, and other similar things.

questions.question: 1. What is the main idea of this reading?
options: A. When tropical cyclones are named
B. When tropical cyclones can do
C. How tropical cyclones are named
D. Who watches for tropical cyclones
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn chủ yếu giải thích quy trình và hệ thống đặt tên bão. Đáp án C đúng. A nói thời điểm, B nói tác hại, D nói người theo dõi — đều không phải ý chính.

questions.question: 2. What does the word "which" in the last paragraph refer to?
questions.explanation: 'Which' ở đây chỉ 'a different list' — danh sách được các nước châu Á sử dụng. Đáp án A đúng.

questions.question: 3. What is the wind speed of a cyclone?
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn ghi rõ tốc độ gió là '60 kph or more' → đáp án B đúng. Các đáp án khác (50, 70, 80) không có trong văn bản.

questions.question: 4. Which of the following letters are NOT used to name hurricanes?
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói danh sách không gồm các chữ Q, U, X, Y và Z → đáp án D đúng. D, T, M đều có thể dùng.

questions.question: 5. What does the word "discover" in paragraph 2 mean?
questions.explanation: 'Discover' = phát hiện, tìm ra — gần nghĩa nhất với 'find out' (tìm hiểu, phát hiện ra). 'look for' = tìm kiếm, 'look at' = nhìn, 'take off' = cất cánh — không đúng.

exercises.passage: The price of holidays can fluctuate a great deal throughout the year, so you can save a lot if you are flexible with your travel dates and avoid peak holiday times. It can be also cheaper if you book well in advance. Before your departure, make sure you get as much information about your destination as you can. Find out if you require any special visas or permits to travel there. Think about spending money as well. Will you be able to access your own money easily enough or will you need to take cash with you? Think about eating larger lunches and smaller evening meals to help your money go further, as lunch is generally cheaper. Make sure that you keep sufficient identification with you at all times. It may also be useful to email a copy of your passport details to yourself, in case it is lost or stolen. Label your suitcases clearly so that they can be easily identified as yours. It can be useful to store a copy of your itinerary in a prominent place in your suitcase so that the airline will know where to find you if your luggage gets lost. Be sure to pack any medication or other essential items in your hand luggage. If your flight is delayed, or your luggage is lost, these can be difficult to obtain in an airport or foreign country.

questions.question: 1. Which can be the best title for the passage?
options: C. How to adjust travel dates
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn đưa ra nhiều lời khuyên cho du khách (đặt trước, kiểm tra hộ chiếu, đóng gói thuốc...) → 'Travel advice' (đáp án B) là tiêu đề phù hợp nhất. A thủ tục, C chỉ một mẹo, D chỉ hành lý.

questions.question: 2. Which one of these is NOT advisable according to the passage?
options: C. Apply for visas if necessary
D. Save money by cutting out dinner
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói ăn trưa nhiều hơn, tối ít hơn để tiết kiệm — không nói cắt bỏ bữa tối hoàn toàn. Đáp án D đúng (không khuyến khích). A, B, C đều có đề cập.

questions.question: 3. According to the passage, your luggage should be ________.
options: A. stored in a safe place
B. tagged in case of being lost
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói gắn nhãn vali rõ ràng để nhận dạng → 'label' = gắn thẻ (tagging). Đáp án B đúng. A lưu trữ, C đóng gói với hộ chiếu, D sơn màu — không đề cập.

questions.question: 4. The underlined word 'it' refers to your ________.
questions.explanation: 'It' chỉ hộ chiếu (passport) — câu nói về việc gửi email bản passport phòng khi 'it is lost or stolen'. Đáp án C đúng.

questions.question: 5. It can be inferred from the passage that ________.
options: A. travelling may cost more in peak season
B. you must always take cash with you
C. larger lunches cost more than smaller ones
D. you can't get back your lost luggage overseas
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn khuyên 'avoid peak holiday times' để tiết kiệm → ngụ ý mùa cao điểm đắt hơn. Đáp án A đúng. B không bắt buộc, C ngược (trưa rẻ), D không có trong văn bản.

exercises.passage: Are you looking for a cheap, clean, effective source of power that doesn't cause pollution or waste natural resources? Look no further than solar energy from our sun. At present, most of our electricity comes from the use of coal, gas, oil or nuclear. This power could be provided by the sun. One percent of the solar energy that reaches the earth is enough to provide power for the total population. Many countries have already used solar energy. Solar panels are placed on the roofs of our house and the Sun's energy is used to heat water. The energy can be stored for a number of days, so on cloudy days you can use solar energy, too. Sweden has an advanced solar energy program. There, all buildings will be heated by solar energy and cars will use solar energy instead of gas by the year 2015.

questions.question: 1. What is the main idea of the passage?
questions.explanation: Toàn bộ đoạn văn nói về khí tự nhiên — lợi ích và ứng dụng. Đáp án B đúng. A chỉ nói chung, C ô nhiễm, D năng lượng hạt nhân — không phải ý chính.

questions.question: 2. How much solar energy is enough for the world's population?
options: A. Two percent of the solar energy.
B. One-third of the solar energy.
C. One percent of the solar energy.
D. One-fifth of the solar energy.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói rõ: 'One percent of the solar energy that reaches the earth is enough' → đáp án C đúng. Các đáp án khác (2%, 1/3, 1/5) không có trong văn bản.

questions.question: 3. Where are solar panels installed?
options: A. They are placed in the garden of the house.
B. They are placed on the roofs of the house.
C. They are placed on the floor of the house.
D. They are placed on the branches of the tall trees behind the house.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: 'Solar panels are placed on the roofs of our house' → đáp án B đúng. A vườn, C sàn nhà, D cành cây — không đề cập.

questions.question: 4. What is the word "placed" closest in meaning to?
questions.explanation: 'Placed' = đặt, để — gần nghĩa với cả 'put' (đặt) và 'installed' (lắp đặt). Đáp án D (B & C) đúng.

questions.question: 5. What does the word "There" refers to?
questions.explanation: 'There' chỉ Thụy Điển (Sweden) được đề cập ở câu trước đó. Đáp án B đúng.

exercises.passage:
In the Mekong Delta, Long Dinh village of Tien Giang province is famous for its traditional craft of weaving flowered mats. The mat's high quality makes them popular domestically, and they are also exported to markets worldwide including Korea, Japan and America.
In spite of its well-established reputation for this traditional craft, mat weaving only started here some 50 years ago. It was first introduced by immigrants from Kim Son, a famous mat weaving village in the northern province of Ninh Binh. However, the technique of weaving sedge mats in Long Dinh, as compared with other places in the South, is somewhat different. Long Dinh branded mats are thicker and have more attractive colours and patterns.
Weaving sedge mats is similar to growing rice. Long Dinh mat production mainly occurs during the dry season, from January to April. Weavers have to work their hardest in May and June, otherwise, when the rainy season starts in July, they will have to put off finishing their products till the next dry season. No matter how much work it requires, Long Dinh mat producers stick with this occupation, as it brings a higher income than growing rice.
This trade provides employment for thousands of local labourers. At present, nearly 1,000 households in Long Dinh village live on weaving mats. To meet market demands, Long Dinh mat weavers have created more products in addition to the traditional sedge mats. Particularly, they are producing a new type of mat made from the dried stalks of water hyacinth, a common material in the Mekong Delta.
Thanks to the planning and further investment, the mat weaving occupation has indeed brought in more income for local residents. Their living standards have improved considerably, resulting in better conditions for the whole village.

questions.question: 1. In order to meet market demands, artisans in Long Dinh ________.
options: A. try to produce various types of products
B. stop producing the traditional sedge mats
C. produce new Products from rare material
D. for thousands of local labourers
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói họ 'created more products in addition to the traditional sedge mats' → đáp án A đúng. B ngược (không ngừng làm), C sai (vật liệu phổ biến chứ không hiếm), D không phải lý do.

questions.question: 2. We can infer from the sentence "Weaving sedge mats is similar to growing rice" that ________.
options: B. both occur at the same time
C. both depend on weather conditions
D. both occur on the same land
questions.explanation: Cả hai hoạt động đều phụ thuộc vào mùa khô/mùa mưa → phụ thuộc thời tiết. Đáp án C đúng. A thu nhập tương tự (nhưng vì thu nhập cao hơn mới theo nghề), B cùng thời gian (đúng nhưng không phải lý do chính), D cùng đất — không đề cập.

questions.question: 3. Despite difficulties, people in Long Dinh try to follow the craft because ________.
options: A. they can make the techniques of weaving different
B. they can earn more money than growing rice
C. they can have jobs in the rainy months
D. they can go to Korea, Japan and America
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói rõ: 'it brings a higher income than growing rice' → đáp án B đúng. A kỹ thuật, C làm mùa mưa, D ra nước ngoài — không phải lý do.

questions.question: 4. We can infer from the passage that ________.
options: A. the craft contributes much to the village economy
B. most of the households in Long Dinh village live on weaving mats
C. the new technique makes labourers work in the dry season
D. Long Dinh mat production is only well-known in foreign markets
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn kết luận nghề dệt chiếu mang lại thu nhập cao hơn và cải thiện đời sống cả làng → đáp án A đúng. B chỉ một phần, C kỹ thuật mới, D chỉ thị trường nước ngoài — không đầy đủ.

questions.question: 5. All of the following are true about the craft in Long Dinh EXCEPT ________.
options: A. the techniques are a little bit different from those in other regions
B. the mats have more attractive colours and designs
C. it has the origin from Kim Son, Ninh Binh
D. it has had the reputation for more than 50 years
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói nghề dệt chiếu bắt đầu 'some 50 years ago' (khoảng 50 năm trước), không phải 'more than 50 years'. Đáp án D sai.

exercises.passage: Life in the big city is face-paced, fun and exciting. There are countless job opportunities and activities to occupy your time. However, with the good, there also comes the bad. Although the big city has more job opportunities; there are also more people competing for a single job. This can make your job search frustrating. Oddly enough, you will see hundreds, if not thousands of jobs available each week, but you still might remain unemployed, especially when the economy is down. In addition, the cost of living is typically higher in big cities, and it can cost you an arm and a leg for a small apartment in a decent area of the city, not to mention other costs to fulfill your basic demands. Diversity is a good thing, but the amount of people can be a bit overwhelming if you are not accustomed to it. There will always be crowds and always be people around. Moreover, traffic can be a nightmare in the big city. It can get so bad that it can turn you into an evil person. If you hate driving in traffic, then the big city life is not for you. Heavy traffic also contributes to the pollution, which is one of the biggest disadvantages of living in the city. Obviously, our health is affected with certain diseases relating to respiratory system and other body parts. A lot of premature deaths are supposed to be the result of long-term exposure to small particles. Most importantly, there is always more crime in a big city, causing you second case your decision for living in a big city. You are much more likely to be a victim of a crime living in a big city than in a small town.

questions.question: 1. According to the passage, some good things of living in the city are ________.
options: A. excellent educational system and recreational activities
B. excellent educational system and countless job opportunities
C. countless job opportunities and activities to occupy your time
D. a lot of kinds of entertainment and shopping centers
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: 'There are countless job opportunities and activities to occupy your time' → đáp án C đúng. A giáo dục, B giáo dục + việc, D mua sắm — không đề cập.

questions.question: 2. While big cities have more job opportunities, it also gives ________.
options: A. more competition for a single job
D. greater chances of being unemployed
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói rõ: 'there are also more people competing for a single job' → đáp án A đúng. B lương cao hơn, C khủng hoảng kinh tế, D thất nghiệp — không đề cập hoặc ngược.

questions.question: 3. What does the phrase "cost an arm and a leg" mean?
options: A. your legs and arms have good value
B. cost a small amount of money
C. you must work hard to earn money
D. cost a lot of money
questions.explanation: 'Cost an arm and a leg' = thành ngữ tiếng Anh nghĩa là 'tốn rất nhiều tiền' → đáp án D đúng. A giá trị tay chân, B ít tiền, C làm việc chăm chỉ — không đúng.

questions.question: 4. According to the paragraph, city is not a perfect place for ________.
options: C. people who hate driving in traffic
D. people who prefer a busy life
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: 'If you hate driving in traffic, then the big city life is not for you' → đáp án C đúng. Người ghét kẹt xe không nên sống ở thành phố lớn.

questions.question: 5. Which of the following sentences is NOT true?
options: C. It costs a lot of money to live in a big city.
D. Crime is not a serious problem in big cities.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: 'there is always more crime in a big city' → tội phạm là vấn đề nghiêm trọng. Đáp án D sai (ngược). A ô nhiễm gây bệnh, B đông đúc, C đắt đỏ — đều đúng theo văn bản.

exercises.passage:
Orbis is an organisation which helps blind people of everywhere. It has built an eye hospital inside an aeroplane and flown in all over the world with an international medical team. Samantha Graham, a fourteen-year-old schoolgirl from England, went with the plane to Mongolia.
Samantha tells the story of the Eukhtul, a young Mongolian girl.
"Last year, when Eukhtul was walking home school, she was attacked by boys with sticks and her eyes were badly damaged. Dr. Duffey, an Orbis doctor, said that without an operation she would never see again. I thought about all the things I do that she couldn't, things like reading schoolbooks, watching television, seeing friends, and I realised how lucky I am."
"The Orbis team agreed to operate on Eukhtul and I was allowed to watch, together with some Mongolian medical student, I prayed the operation would be successful. The next day I waited nervously with Eukhtul while Dr. Duffey removed her bandages. 'In six months your sight will be back to normal,' he said. Eukhtul smiled, her mother cried, and I had to wipe away some tears, too."
"Now Eukhtul wants to study hard to become a doctor. Her whole future has changed, thanks to a simple operation. We should all think more about how much our sight means to us."

questions.question: 1. What information can be learned from this passage?
options: A. The best way of studying medicine
B. the international work of some eye doctors
C. the difficulties for blind travelers
D. the life of schoolchildren in Mongolia
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn mô tả công việc quốc tế của bác sĩ mắt Orbis giúp người mù → đáp án B đúng. A học y, C du khách mù, D học sinh Mông Cổ — không phải ý chính.

questions.question: 2. The word "she" in paragraph 2 refers to ________.
questions.explanation: 'She' ở đây chỉ Eukhtul — cô gái Mông Cổ mà câu chuyện đang kể. Đáp án C đúng.

questions.question: 3. After meeting Eukhtul, Samantha felt ________.
options: B. grateful for her own sight
C. proud of the doctor's skill
questions.explanation: Samantha nói 'I realised how lucky I am' (nhận ra mình may mắn thế nào) → cô ấy biết ơn đôi mắt của mình. Đáp án B đúng. A giận dữ, C tự hào, D ngạc nhiên — không đúng.

questions.question: 4. What the result of Eukhtul's operation?
options: A. After some time she will see as well as before
B. Before she recovers, she needs another operation
C. She can see better but can never have normal eyes
D. She can't see perfectly again
questions.explanation: Bác sĩ nói: 'In six months your sight will be back to normal' → sau một thời gian cô ấy sẽ nhìn được bình thường. Đáp án A đúng. Các đáp án B, C, D đều ngược với văn bản.

questions.question: 5. What is the writer's main purpose in writing this passage?
options: A. To describe a dangerous trip
B. To explain how sight can be lost
C. To report a patient's cure
D. To warn against playing with sticks
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn kể lại ca mổ chữa mù thành công của Eukhtul nhờ tổ chức Orbis → đáp án C đúng (báo cáo việc chữa khỏi cho bệnh nhân). A chuyến đi nguy hiểm, B mất thị giác, D chơi gậy — không đúng.

exercises.passage:
After only 50 minute flying from Ho Chi Minh City, you will set foot on the tropical paradise of Vietnam and the world: Phu Quoc Island.
The island has a roughly triangular shape with a north-south length of 50km and a west-east width of 25km. A great part of the terrain is filled with beautiful sandy beaches, but there is a mountainous region with 99 peaks, among which the Peak of Chua Mountain is the tallest one at 603 meters. Due to Phu Quoc's location in the Gulf of Thailand, its climate is sub-equatorial with a temperate weather all year round, making trips to Phu Quoc possible any time in the year. However, the best time to travel to this island is during the dry season, from November until March, when the sky is blue and clear and the rains are away.
Phu Quoc is most famous for its the cuisines and a natural wonderful coastline. The most famous food of Phu Quoc is fish sauce, which has become quite popular all over Vietnam and the world. Besides, another thing worth trying there is the spicy yet interesting black pepper. However, the factor that will definitely intrigue you to visit Phu Quoc is its untouched coastline featuring several heavenly beaches. They have yet to be explored to their full ability, but this fact might be actually positive as it gives the shores a romantic beauty that you can find in nowhere else in the world.

questions.question: 1. What is Phu Quoc Island regarded as?
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn gọi Phú Quốc là 'the tropical paradise of Vietnam and the world' → thiên đường nhiệt đới. Đáp án B đúng. Các đáp án khác (A, C, D) không phải tên gọi trong văn bản.

questions.question: 2. According to the passage, Phu Quoc Island ________.
options: A. has both beaches and mountains
B. doesn't have much tourist attraction
C. has the tallest mountain in Vietnam
D. doesn't have rains all the year round
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói cả bãi biển cát đẹp (beautiful sandy beaches) và vùng núi (mountainous region with 99 peaks) → đáp án A đúng. B không có nhiều điểm thu hút (sai), C núi cao nhất Việt Nam (không đề cập), D mưa quanh năm (ngược).

questions.question: 3. Tourists can visit Phu Quoc anytime in the year thanks to ________.
options: A. its location by the sea
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: 'climate is sub-equatorial with a temperate weather all year round' → khí hậu ôn hòa quanh năm → đáp án C đúng. A vị trí biển, B người địa phương thân thiện, D mùa khô — đều không giải thích được 'any time in the year'.

questions.question: 4. The word "intrigue" in paragraph 3 has the closest meaning to ________.
questions.explanation: 'Intrigue' = gây tò mò, thu hút — gần nghĩa nhất với 'attract' (hấp dẫn). 'promote' = quảng bá, 'inspire' = truyền cảm hứng, 'pay attention to' = chú ý — không đúng.

questions.question: 5. Which of the following statements is NOT true?
options: A. Phu Quoc Island is located in the Gulf of Thailand.
B. The beaches in Phu Quoc Island have been explored to their full potentials.
C. Phu Quoc's dry season begins from November and lasts through March.
D. The island is roughly triangular in shape.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: 'They have yet to be explored to their full ability' → các bãi biển CHƯA được khai thác hết → đáp án B sai (bãi biển đã được khai thác hết là ngược). A, C, D đều đúng theo văn bản.

exercises.passage:
In the early 17th century, most of the southern region of Vietnam was nearly uninhabited and in the position of Ho Chi Minh City, there was a small village formed with a few residents. However, thanks to its advantage in location, the town grew both economically and politically. By the 19th century, this had become a cultural hub of the South as well as an important trading center of the country.
You might not know that there was a time Saigon was referred to as the Pearl of the Far East. Sadly, having been through various occurrences and two disastrous wars has stunted the city's development. Only after the political instabilities had settled, Saigon recovered miraculously and maintained its leading position in terms of both the economics and culture. Officially named as Ho Chi Minh City, Saigon today has 22 districts in total and attracts hundreds of thousands of tourists annually.

questions.question: 1. What is the best title of the passage?
options: D. Saigon: Hub of the South East Vietnam
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn truyền thuyết lịch sử Sài Gòn từ quá khứ đến hiện tại → 'Then and Now' (trước và sau) là tiêu đề phù hợp nhất. Đáp án C đúng. A thất lạc-tìm lại, B hiện tại và quá khứ, D miền Nam Đông Nam — không đúng.

questions.question: 2. What happened to Saigon in the 19th century?
options: A. It became popular all over Asia.
B. It became a cultural hub of the South and an important trading center of Vietnam.
C. It became the most important trading center in the world.
D. It was no longer visited by international tourists.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: 'became a cultural hub of the South as well as an important trading center of the country' → đáp án B đúng. A phổ biến châu Á (không đề cập), C trung tâm thương mại thế giới (quá), D du khách quốc tế (ngược).

questions.question: 3. The city's development has been stunted because of ________.
options: C. natural disasters and disastrous wars
D. different occurrences and disastrous wars
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: 'various occurrences and two disastrous wars has stunted the city's development' → đáp án D đúng. A chỉ chiến tranh, B sự kiện lịch sử (chung), C thiên tai + chiến tranh (không đề cập thiên tai).

questions.question: 4. The word "occurrences" is closest in meaning to ________.
questions.explanation: 'Occurrences' = những sự kiện xảy ra — gần nghĩa với 'incidents' (sự cố, sự kiện). 'situations' = tình huống, 'adventures' = cuộc phiêu lưu, 'affairs' = công việc — ít phù hợp hơn.

questions.question: 5. Which of the following sentences is NOT true?
options: A. In the early 17th century, there were only a few residents living on the position of Saigon.
B. The location of Saigon helped the town develop its economy and politics.
C. Saigon was once referred as the Pearl of the Far East.
D. Saigon had recovered and held its leading position before the political instabilities settled.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn: Sài Gòn phục hồi 'only after the political instabilities had settled' (sau khi bất ổn chính trị ổn định) → đáp án D sai (nói ngược). A, B, C đều đúng theo văn bản.
